title: Fleet Feature Refinement
description: Ten GSD-native fleet modules built clean-room: safety, credentials, schema, event bus, topology, routing, intake, audit, pattern detection, and retrospective loop.

nodes.description: Block-level gate on all fleet outputs. Non-optional, non-bypassable, deterministic pass/fail with traceable reason. The Paula of the fleet chipset.
Operations authorized by tier, not identity. Tiers encode role, scope, and clearance. Identity-to-tier mapping is separate from tier definitions.
Formal JSON Schema for YAML chipset definitions with versioning contract. Extensions are additive. Existing definitions load without modification after schema updates.
Typed cross-module event routing. Events are declared, not inferred. Per-module queue isolation prevents cross-contamination. Dead letter handling for undeliverable events.
Node registration with capability declaration. Health monitoring with configurable polling. Failover paths pre-computed eagerly at registration time, not at failure time.
Workload complexity profiles matched to model capability ranges. Cost tracked per workload class. Fallback paths explicit and logged. Routing decisions auditable.
Contract-declared input validation at the pipeline boundary. Violations rejected with user-facing messages. Nothing malformed reaches downstream modules. Contract registry is queryable.
Immutable append-only log of every skill invocation. SHA-256 hashes of input and output. Read-only query interface. Permanent retention with cold-storage archival.
Continuous analysis of audit trail and event bus. Four pattern classes: PERFORMANCE, CORRECTNESS, SAFETY, COST. Threshold, trend, and comparison-based detection modes.
Structured lesson records from pattern signals, mapped to NASA SE categories. Carry-forward packages compound knowledge across missions. Same mechanism as S36 carry-forward controller.
All 10 modules specified independently before any thepopebot source was reviewed. Convergence verified after specification. SC-CLN safety test enforces zero code borrowing.
Specialize the hardware, share the bus, free the CPU. Safety Warden=Paula (gates). Credential Tiering=Denise (renders access picture). DACP Event Bus=Agnus (schedules and routes).
Four specialized teams (Alpha: foundation, Bravo: bus+routing, Charlie: intake+audit, Delta: intelligence) with three CAPCOM synthesis gates between tier completions.

cross_references.title: Amiga Lives
cross_references.connection: Chipset model (Agnus/Denise/Paula) as architectural pattern. FLT maps the pattern to fleet module roles.

cross_references.title: After-Action Review
cross_references.connection: Architecture audit methodology. FLT implements recommendations from AAR for safety warden, credential model, and audit trail.

cross_references.title: Seattle 360
cross_references.connection: Wave execution pattern, carry-forward controller, retrospective engine. FLT extends these patterns to fleet architecture.

cross_references.title: Weird Al Yankovic
cross_references.connection: DACP integration. Lex's theorem on convergent systems proves architectural correctness through independent discovery.

cross_references.title: Dorothea Anga Archival
cross_references.connection: Fleet research generation pattern. FLT audit trail and pattern detection share lineage with DAA archival fingerprint methodology.
